summary: Historical Calibration Bootstrap (P1) feature testing - All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Calibration endpoints, MongoDB persistence, WeatherTrader integration, and Weather page Calibration tab all working correctly.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/run - runs calibration for single station (KLGA) with status=calibrated, sample_count>=80, base_sigma_f, mean_bias_f, sigma_by_lead
POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/run - returns sigma_by_lead with all 5 lead brackets (0_24, 24_48, 48_72, 72_120, 120_168)
POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/run - handles unknown station_id gracefully with errors list
GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/status - returns total_stations_calibrated=5, total_stations_registered=8, last_run, last_status=completed, stations
GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/status - station details include sample_count, calibrated_at, base_sigma_0_24, base_sigma_48_72, mean_bias_f, ready=true
GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/KLGA - returns station_id, calibrated_at, sample_count=91, sigma_by_lead_hours, seasonal_factors, station_type_factor, mean_bias_f
GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/{station_id} - all 5 calibrated stations (KLGA, KORD, KATL, KDFW, KMIA) return valid data
POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/reload - returns status=reloaded, calibrations_loaded=5, stations list
GET /api/strategies/weather/health - calibration_status shows using_defaults=false, calibration_source=historical_calibration after calibration
frontend_ui_tests: Weather Trader heading visible with PAPER mode badge (data-testid='weather-exec-mode-badge')
Scan status visible (data-testid='weather-scan-status') showing IDLE | Scans: 0
All 6 tabs present: Signals, Rejected, Executions, Forecasts, Calibration, Health
Calibration tab - Shadow-Mode Summary section (data-testid='section-shadow-summary') renders with Shadow Config and Operational Stats
Calibration tab - Shadow mode badge (data-testid='shadow-mode-badge') shows current mode
Calibration tab - Calibration Health section (data-testid='section-calibration-health') shows status COLLECTING, Using Defaults: Yes, 30 total records
Calibration tab - Sigma Calibration section (data-testid='section-sigma-calibration') shows 5/8 stations calibrated, Last Run date, status COMPLETED
Calibration tab - Run Calibration button (data-testid='run-calibration-btn') visible
Calibration tab - Reload button (data-testid='reload-calibration-btn') visible (because calibrations exist)
Calibration tab - Per-Station Accuracy section (data-testid='section-station-accuracy') shows KLGA with 1 sample, MAE 4.3F

Calibration tab - Calibrated Sigma Values section (data-testid='section-station-sigma') shows KLGA, KORD, KATL, KDFW, KMIA with 91 samples each, READY badges, sigma values for 0-24h and 48-72h lead times, bias values
Calibration tab - Forecast Accuracy Log section (data-testid='section-accuracy-log') renders table
Health tab - All 6 sections render: Calibration, Scanner Metrics, Feed Health, Rejection Reasons, Strategy Config, Classified Markets
Signals, Rejected, Executions, Forecasts tabs all clickable and show appropriate empty state messages

seed_data_creation: 5 calibration records in MongoDB weather_sigma_calibration collection (created by main agent): KLGA, KORD, KATL, KDFW, KMIA - each with 91 samples
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical Calibration Bootstrap (P1) fully implemented and tested. KEY FEATURES: (1) POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/run - fetches 90 days historical data from Open-Meteo, computes sigma_by_lead_hours for each station (2) GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/status - shows total calibrated 5/8, last_run timestamp, per-station details with sample_count, sigma values, bias (3) GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/{station_id} - returns full calibration with sigma_by_lead_hours, seasonal_factors, station_type_factor (4) POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/reload - reloads from MongoDB into WeatherTrader._calibrations (5) Weather health shows calibration_status.using_defaults=false, calibration_source=historical_calibration after calibration (6) MongoDB weather_sigma_calibration collection has 5 documents (7) Weather page Calibration tab has: Shadow-Mode Summary, Calibration Health, Sigma Calibration section with Run/Reload buttons, Per-Station Accuracy, Calibrated Sigma Values showing all 5 stations with sigma data (8) Engine is STOPPED as required.

features_tested.calibration_run_endpoint: PASS - POST runs calibration, returns per-station results with sample_count, base_sigma_f, mean_bias_f, sigma_by_lead
features_tested.calibration_status_endpoint: PASS - GET returns total calibrated 5/8, last run info, per-station details
features_tested.station_calibration_endpoint: PASS - GET /calibration/{station_id} returns sigma_by_lead_hours, seasonal_factors, mean_bias_f
features_tested.calibration_reload_endpoint: PASS - POST reloads 5 calibrations from MongoDB into WeatherTrader
features_tested.mongodb_persistence: PASS - weather_sigma_calibration collection has 5 documents with correct schema
features_tested.frontend_sigma_calibration_section: PASS - Shows Stations Calibrated 5/8, Last Run, COMPLETED status, Run/Reload buttons
features_tested.frontend_station_sigma_section: PASS - Shows all 5 stations with 91 samples, READY badges, sigma values
features_tested.regression_weather_endpoints: PASS - All existing endpoints (signals, executions, forecasts, stations, config) work
features_tested.regression_shadow_accuracy_endpoints: PASS - shadow-summary, accuracy/history, accuracy/calibration, accuracy/unresolved all work
features_tested.regression_demo_mode: PASS - Demo mode weather endpoints still work
